name: MVC Analysis — PROD_DB database
description: MVC Analysis subagent analyzes tables for multi-value compression opportunities using the Package Bit-Cost Model.
scenario: The MVC Analysis subagent is launched for PROD_DB.fact_sales. It should analyze column value distributions, apply the Package Bit-Cost Model, and generate ALTER TABLE COMPRESS statements.
chatbot_role: MVC Compression Advisor that analyzes tables for multi-value compression opportunities using the Package Bit-Cost Model.
expected_outcome: Agent gets table metadata, queries value distributions for eligible columns, applies the Bit-Cost Model to determine optimal compression values, and produces ALTER TABLE statements with estimated savings.
